nodes.name: Black-throated wren-babbler
nodes.summary: Black-throated wren-babbler（Black-throated wren-babbler，学名 Turdinus atrigularis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |last3=Eens |first3=Marcel |last4=Costantini |first4=David |date=August 2018 |title=Physiological and immunological responses of birds and mammals to forest degradation: A meta-analysis |journal=Biological Conservation |volume=224 |pages=223–229 |doi=10.1016/j.biocon.2018.06.002 |bibcode=2018BCons.224..223M |issn=0006-3207}} It is threatened by habitat loss
